title: Ambuja Cements is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Ambuja Cements is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Ambuja Cements are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ambuja Cements:
Ambuja Cements is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambuja Cements!
